texts.title: Introduction to Sorting
texts.content: The sorting algorithm is important for text analysis. Sorting helps to organize words by frequency.

texts.title: Bubble Sort
texts.content: Bubble sort is simple but slow. However it is easy to understand and implement.

texts.title: Merge Sort
texts.content: Merge sort is fast and stable. It has O(n log n) complexity and works perfectly on large datasets.
